ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2018 Continued To Nov-20-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to NOV-20-2018 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
